evidences.content: #### Standard CSV (Python) `time, open, high, low, close, volume 1364774400, 100.0, 93.03, 93.25, 93.03, 247.28` ### Frequently Asked Questions1. What exchanges are supported? CryptoDatum currently provides historical cryptocurrency data from Binance and Bitfinex. #### 2. What timeframes are available? Datasets can be downloaded with candlestick intervals from 1 minute (1m) to 1 day (1d). #### 3. What fields are included in the dataset? Each dataset contains timestamp, open, high, low, close and trading volume (OHLCV). #### 4. How are the datasets delivered? Datasets are delivered as a ZIP file containing CSV or Excel files ready for analysis. ### Popular Crypto Datasets [...] FAQs Download crypto data # Menu close Download crypto data FAQs # Download Historical Crypto Data Download full historical cryptocurrency price datasets (OHLCV) in CSV or Excel format. Select exchanges like Binance or Bitfinex, choose your trading pairs and candle sizes from 1 minute to 1 day, and receive a ready-to-use dataset in a single download. ### Instructions [...] We use cookies to give you a better experience on CryptoDatum.io. evidences.title: Save Historical data from Binance
evidences.content: ``` frombinance.client import Client # fetch 1 minute klines for the last day up until now klines = get_historical_klines("BNBBTC", Client. KLINE_INTERVAL_1MINUTE, "1 day ago UTC") # fetch 30 minute klines for the last month of 2017 klines = get_historical_klines("ETHBTC", Client. KLINE_INTERVAL_30MINUTE,"1 Dec, 2017","1 Jan, 2018") # fetch weekly klines since it listed klines = get_historical_klines("NEOBTC", KLINE_INTERVAL_1WEEK,"1 Jan, 2017") ``` The full code can be found in the examples folder of the python-binance package. ### Save to file Once we have fetched the list of klines, it makes sense to save them to a file for later use. [...] `get_historical_klines` has been added to the binance.client, so now all you need to do is run ``` import json frombinance.client import Client client = Client("", "") klines = client. get_historical_klines("ETHBTC", Client. KLINE_INTERVAL_30MINUTE,"1 Dec, 2017","1 Jan, 2018") ``` ### Next Steps With these cached klines we can open them at a later date and run backtesting on them. See the related [Kucoin post][kucoin-post] to download historical klines on Kucoin. Subsequent posts will look at how to use pandas and TA-Lib for some simple ba...

evidences.title: #Update | Binance Co-CEO Richard Teng expressed confidence in ...
evidences.content: “At the macro level, there remains uncertainty around interest rate movements and ongoing geopolitical developments, which weigh on risk assets such as crypto,” Teng said. “For those who have been involved in crypto for a long period of time, you know that crypto moves through cycles.” Read more: #Binance #RichardTeng #Cryptocurrency #DigitalAssets #Bitcoin #CryptoMarkets #InstitutionalInvestors #Blockchain May be an image of money and text that says 'E វ្នលិ RiC HeadofR Binance Bulletin BINANCE Co-CEO RICHARD TENG: [...] ## Entrepreneur Asia Pacific's Post ### Entrepreneur Asia Pacific February 26 at 8:30 PM · #Update | Binance Co-CEO Richard Teng expressed confidence in the long-term outlook for digital assets, emphasizing sustained institutional engagement despite recent market volatility, during a fireside chat at Consensus Hong Kong 2026. Since peaking in October 2025, cryptocurrency markets have experienced a significant correction, with approximately $2 trillion in value erased and Bitcoin trading below $70,000 at recent lows. While some market participants have raised concerns about a prolonged downturn, Teng underscored the cyclical nature of digital asset markets.
